# TheEduAssist E-Learning Design Agency
Website: https://theeduassist.com

TheEduAssist is an e-learning design agency that helps course creators, coaches, consultants, training companies, and education businesses build Kajabi websites, landing pages, courses, funnels, email automations, migrations, templates, and launch-ready learning systems. The company focuses on clear structure, professional design, organized learner experience, and practical launch support without guaranteeing sales or revenue.

## Core Services
- Kajabi Website Design
- Kajabi Landing Page Design
- Kajabi Course Setup
- Kajabi Funnel Setup
- Kajabi Email Automation
- Kajabi Course Migration
- Kajabi Templates
- Kajabi Support & Maintenance

## Positioning and Integrity
The agency believes that online courses should not feel unfinished, generic, or confusing. Support does not guarantee sales or revenue; it focuses entirely on the structure, design, technical execution, and learner flow. TheEduAssist provides professional support without fake promises. Kajabi is a third-party platform; platform support does not imply official partnership unless explicitly stated.

## Contact
Email: Info@theeduassist.com
Booking: https://theeduassist.com/book-free-kajabi-audit/
